device_setup_description: Connect your local device as an Executor to run tasks
toolbox_title: Install Local Device with Weibo AI Toolbox
toolbox_description_macos: Your macOS device can now install and manage local devices directly with Weibo AI Toolbox, without running manual commands.
toolbox_description_windows: Your Windows device can now install and manage local devices directly with Weibo AI Toolbox, without running manual commands.
toolbox_hint: Download and open Weibo AI Toolbox, then follow the in-app guide to complete local device setup.
toolbox_security_hint: Use the official download link for the installer, then finish the remaining device setup steps inside the app.
no_apikeys: No API Keys available, please create one first
apikey_name_required: Please enter an API Key name
apikey_existing_warning: When using an existing API Key, replace <YOUR_API_KEY> in the command manually
create_apikey_desc: Create a new API Key for device authentication
apikey_save_warning: Please save your API Key securely. This information will only be shown once.
apikey_once_warning: This API Key will only be shown once. Please copy and save it securely. If lost, you will need to create a new API Key.
windows_step_download_desc: Run PowerShell as Administrator, download the install script to Desktop
windows_step_execute_desc: Run the install script to complete Executor installation and startup
windows_security_hint: Windows may block running unknown scripts, please run PowerShell as Administrator
windows_prerequisite_hint: Please install Node.js and Git first. Restart PowerShell after installation for environment variables to take effect
windows_execution_policy_hint: If script execution is restricted, run first: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope CurrentUser -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned
gatekeeper_hint: macOS may block running unknown apps, please allow in System Settings
beta_warning: This feature is in beta. Running on personal devices carries risks, please use with caution
plugins_description: Install plugins to extend Agent capabilities
plugin_browser_description: Enable Agent to control browsers for web automation
slots_full_hint: All task slots are occupied. Please wait for current tasks to finish.
